business.name: Contour Plastering Tiling & Plumbing
business.tagline: Expert Tiling, Plastering & Plumbing Done Right

sample_reviews.author: James T.
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant job on our bathroom — the tiling is immaculate and the plastering is perfectly smooth. Very tidy, professional team.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Had our wet room fully fitted by Contour. Excellent workmanship, great communication throughout and finished on time.

sample_reviews.author: David R.
sample_reviews.text: Good value for money and a high standard of work. The tiling in our kitchen looks fantastic. Would definitely recommend.

brand.usp: Contour Plastering Tiling & Plumbing brings together three essential trades under one roof, delivering seamless, high-quality finishes for bathrooms, kitchens and living spaces across Birmingham.
brand.hero_headline: Quality Tiling, Plastering & Plumbing in Birmingham
brand.about_paragraph: We are Contour Plastering Tiling & Plumbing, a multi-trade specialist business based in Moseley, Birmingham. I take pride in delivering high-quality tiling, plastering and plumbing services to homeowners across the city, ensuring every job is finished to the highest standard. Whether you need a full bathroom renovation, a fresh plaster skim, or a stunning new tiled splashback, we have the skills and experience to get it done right.
